zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Macgilronan於1248年出生在蘇格蘭雷福福爾厄斯金時，她的父親Gilronan MacGilronan26歲，母親Elizabeth Comyn25歲。她於1270年與Sir John Erskine Of Mar在蘇格蘭雷福福爾厄斯金結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1337年12月在她的家鄉享年89歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭雷福福爾厄斯金。

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Macgilronan was born in 1248, in Erskine, Renfrewshire, Scotland, her father, Gilronan MacGilronan, was 26 and her mother, Elizabeth Comyn, was 25. She married Sir John Erskine Of Mar in 1270, in Erskine, Renfrewshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 5 daughters. She died in December 1337, in her hometown, at the age of 89, and was buried in Erskine, Renfrewshire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Macgilronan est née en 1248, à Erskine, Renfrewshire, Écosse, son père, Gilronan MacGilronan, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Comyn, avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John Erskine Of Mar en 1270, à Erskine, Renfrewshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée en décembre 1337, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 89 ans, et a été enterrée à Erskine, Renfrewshire, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret Macgilronan 1248 in Erskine, Renfrewshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Gilronan MacGilronan 26 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth Comyn 25. Sie hat 1270 in Erskine, Renfrewshire, Scotland Sir John Erskine Of Mar geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb im Dezember 1337 im Alter von 89 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Erskine, Renfrewshire, Scotland begraben.

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Macgilronan(이)가 1248년 스컷랜드 렌프레w실르 어스킨에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Gilronan MacGilronan(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Comyn(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 1270년 스컷랜드 렌프레w실르 어스킨에서 Sir John Erskine Of Mar(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1337년 12월 그녀의 고향에서 89세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 렌프레w실르 어스킨에 묻혔다.

ru.Carrick, Argyle, Scotland: каррикк, аргилл анд бут, Шотландия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Macgilronan родилась в 1248 г. в местности эрскаин, ренфрюшир, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Gilronan MacGilronan было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Comyn, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John Erskine Of Mar в 1270 г. в местности эрскаин, ренфрюшир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 5 дочерей. Она умерла декабрь 1337 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 89 лет и была похоронена в местности эрскаин, ренфрюшир, Шотландия.
